children.name: Tell me what you want to achieve
children.characters:
Tell me what you want
to achieve

children.name: You can say or type as much as you want. We'll organize it for you.
children.characters:
You can say or type as much as you want.
We'll organize it for you.

children.name: Try: "I would like to read for 15 mins every night at 8 PM"
children.characters:
Try: "I would like to read for 15 mins every
night at 8 PM"

children.name: Or type your thoughts here... Examples: I want to sleep earlier, stop eating junk food at night, work out three times a week, and not be on my phone at 9.30 PM
children.characters:
Or type your thoughts here...

Examples: I want to sleep earlier, stop 
eating junk food at night, work out three 
times a week, and not be on my phone at 9.30 PM

children.name: I want to drink water every morning, read for 30 minutes before bed, and go to the gym on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays
children.characters: I want to drink water every morning, read for 30 minutes before bed, and go to the gym on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays

children.name: Got it. I'm setting up: morning hydration, reading before bed, and gym three times a week. I'll put that together for you now
children.characters: Got it. I'm setting up: morning hydration, reading before bed, and gym three times a week. I'll put that together for you now

children.name: I had a really busy day and feel a bit overwhelmed.
children.characters: I had a really busy day and feel a bit overwhelmed.

children.name: Footer - Bottom UI: Voice Button & Waves
You can use the edit function to change the results of the habits you want to have!
